Describe the sequence of objects crushed by the car tire throughout the video, noting specific timestamps for when each crushing action occurs.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the tire crushes blue and purple stress balls, bursting the blue one; at 6s, the tire flattens a row of red paper cups; at 8s, the tire rolls over a yellow banana-shaped object; at 12s, the tire shatters a black computer mouse; at 18s, the tire crushes a pile of chocolate candies.
